description: CompositionWhite sweater made of 100% acrylic, has three-quarter sleeves, an exaggerated mock neck and a ribbed hemFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis soft sweater from jealous 21 is so plush that it will seem like you never left the comfort of your cosy blanket. Wear this with leggings or form fitting denims and boots.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
